--- CV_Tristan_Le_Jeune_h.pdf ---
TRISTAN LE JEUNE 
1 Rosse Court Grove, Lucan, Co, Dublin, K78 FX51 
+353 89 968 1429 | tristanlejeune33@gmail.com 
Availability: Immediate 
Proactive and versatile business professional with experience in operations, sales, customer relations, 
and after-sales support (SAV). Strong analytical and organisational skills, with the ability to adapt 
quickly, manage priorities and assist clients with  effective, solution-oriented support. Motivated by 
growth, efficiency and continuous improvement. 
EDUCATION 
Master’s Degree – Business Development & Sales Engineering 
INSEEC Business School, Bordeaux — 2022–2024 
Bachelor’s Degree – Business Unit Management 
EBBS Business School, Bordeaux — 2019–2022 
 
EXPERIENCE 
Bartender – The Temple Bar, Dublin 
Nov 2025 – Feb 2026 
 
• Delivered high-volume customer service in one of Ireland’s busiest hospitality venues 
• Managed fast-paced service operations with strong attention to accuracy and client 
satisfaction 
• Handled international clientele, improving English communication fluency 
• Maintained cash handling accuracy and POS operations 
 
Founder – RULIZ (Digital Menu SaaS for Hospitality) – Bordeaux, France 
Sept 2024 – Dec 2025 
 
• Deployment of a multichannel prospecting strategy 
• Conducting personalized demonstrations and client closing 
• Optimization of the sales process and average basket size (HubSpot) 
• Development of strategic B2B partnerships 
 
Deputy Director TOPA “hospitality” – Bordeaux, France 
Aug 2022 – Aug 2024 
 
• Business development, negotiation & sales 
• Market analysis & project management 
• Client relationship management 
• Team leadership & reporting (KPIs) 
• Accounting & financial oversight 
 
Management Assistant / Sales Advisor Maison Basque de Bordeaux – Bordeaux, France  
Mar 2021 – Aug 2022 
 
• Sales & commercial actions 
• Development of sales pitch & communication strategy 
• ERP implementation 
• Business plan creation & financial analysis 
• Supplier prospection & negotiation 
 
SKILLS 
Customer Service : 
 
Customer Service: 
Teamwork, communication, problem-solving, adaptability, time management, fast learner 
 
Technical: 
CRM/ERP systems, POS systems, Microsoft Excel, Google Workspace, Canva 
AI-assisted development (ChatGPT, workflow optimisation),Prompt engineering & process 
automation, 
 
Languages: 
French (native), English (B2), Spanish (A2)
